学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 86th in 2026, with steady improvement in recent years (94th in 2021 → 86th in 2026), indicating continuously enhanced comprehensive strength; Douyin popularity ranking 25th (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of 1.83 million, high short video exposure, reflecting increased application attention; no obvious admission gap records; however, the university has traditional characteristics in agriculture, forestry, light industry, etc.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, highly aligned with Guangxi University's offerings in Electrical, Computer, Electronic Information, etc., and rising popularity of related majors may push up overall application heat; Shaanxi Province's 2026 Physics Category examinees approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 2025 (172,468), significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition; Guangxi University is located in Guangxi, far from Shaanxi, with cross-province applications subject to certain regional preference effects; the university's enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 0.9% (2025), as an out-of-province enrollment, local candidates' willingness to apply is limited by regional factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the gradual recovery trend of historical rankings from the gap, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan, the significant increase of about 19.7% in Shaanxi Physics Category examinees, and the sustained heat of engineering majors, competition is expected to intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 36982; predicted minimum ranking approximately 36294, range 35794–36794.
